---
title: "Practice Problems"
sidebar: false
---


Please review the [Practice Problems Policies](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1blw99F3L2WYTpfjvkRwOcmW8uGBAZvrzQPuyIVZtnxQ/edit?usp=sharing) document before proceeding!

**...due at 11:59 pm Central on Moodle!**

- [Practice Sets 1](assignments/ps1.qmd), due 02/04
- [Practice Sets 2](assignments/ps2.qmd), due 02/09
- [Practice Sets 3](assignments/ps3.qmd), due 02/23
- [Practice Sets 4](assignments/ps4.qmd), due 03/09
- [Practice Sets 5](assignments/ps5.qmd), due 03/24
- [Practice Sets 6](assignments/ps6.qmd), due 04/13
- [Practice Sets 7](assignments/ps7.qmd), due 04/22
